problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 191: Assume statements are allowed only in component types
problems.cause: AGREE assume statements are placed in a component implementation (ADIRU.EMV2) instead of a component type
problems.minimal_edit: Move the entire annex agree block from ADIRU.EMV2 to ADIRU

problems.cause: Port names acc1_input, acc1_output are not visible in AGREE; only subcomponent names are visible, and AGREE cannot resolve port references without type context
problems.minimal_edit: Remove all port equality and flow expressions (lines 191-205) since ports cannot be referenced in AGREE without type-level visibility

problems.cause: ADIRU.impl is an implementation name, not a component type; AGREE cannot compare component instances to implementation names
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the deployment_mapping assumption entirely, as it compares subcomponents to implementation names which are not valid AGREE expressions

executor_steps: Remove the annex agree block from ADIRU.EMV2
Create a new annex agree block in the component type ADIRU (not its implementation)
In the new ADIRU annex agree block, do not include any port equality or flow expressions (acc_pr.acc1_output = ..., acc_pr.acc1_output -> ...)
In the new ADIRU annex agree block, do not include any deployment_mapping assumption (ADIRU.impl = main_cpu.part1, etc.)
Leave the ADIRU.EMV2 annex agree block entirely deleted as it is invalid in implementation scope
